source: https://www.autosar.org/fileadmin/standards/R22-11/AP/AUTOSAR_EXP_SOVD.pdf
title: AUTOSAR Adaptive Platform R22-11 - Explanation of Service-Oriented Vehicle Diagnostics
downloaded: 2026-04-14
covers: AUTOSAR's interpretation of SOVD: discovery, capability description, locking, faults, modes, single-ECU jobs, bulk data, communication logs.
license: AUTOSAR Document, freely downloadable from public autosar.org. Subject to AUTOSAR document license terms; reference-only / internal use.
